channel.title: What Is Being Built — Daily Activity Feed
channel.description: Daily updates on open-source automated research tools: commits, releases, and community activity.

item.title: Daily digest — 2026-06-21
item.description:
Our community has seen significant progress across multiple projects recently. The `scienceverse/metacheck` repository resolved a critical crash issue and added new functions to load paper databases, enhancing its functionality. Meanwhile, `giladfeldman/docpluck` released version 2.4.95, shipping "REQUEST_11" and introducing features like field flattening for non-clinical result tables. Additionally, `giladfeldman/escicheck` synced with `effectcheck` version 0.6.3, and `shaheedazaad/auto-zcurve` revised its validation note with a new citation. Lastly, `giovannacdelsordo/output-it-forward` added a convenient Chrome Webstore link, making it easier for users to access the tool. These updates demonstrate the connections and collaborations within our community, driving progress and improvement across various open-source research tools.

121 commits across 7 active repositories this week.

New releases: metacheck v0.1.0-beta

Dormant repos revived: output-it-forward

Most active:

regcheck37 commits
coarse31 commits
docpluck30 commits
metacheck20 commits
escicheck1 commits

item.title: docpluck: 4 commits today
item.description:
giladfeldman/docpluck

The `main` branch was the focus of the recent work, with several commits made to it. The documentation was updated to log version 2.4.95 and note that "REQUEST_11" has shipped, along with deferred follow-ups including "effect_type opt-in, 77859 caption-number, text-layer caveat". Additionally, documentation was updated to record the cross-session skill-file commit coordination, which is now fulfilled. A separate commit addressed "prior-session housekeeping" on the `main` branch, including a "REQUEST_10 customer broadcast, daily-digest cron-retry lesson, deploy smoke-gate fix". Furthermore, a feature was added to "flatten fields for non-clinical result tables" as part of "REQUEST_11" in version 2.4.95 on the `main` branch.

4 commit(s) today:

  • c1fa68b [main] docs(todo): log v2.4.95 / REQUEST_11 shipped + deferred follow-ups (effect_type opt-in, 77859 caption-number, text-layer caveat) — Gilad Feldman
  • 370b89c [main] docs(handoff): record the cross-session skill-file commit coordination (now fulfilled in b2c6aa2) — Gilad Feldman
  • b2c6aa2 [main] chore(docs+deploy): prior-session housekeeping — REQUEST_10 customer broadcast, daily-digest cron-retry lesson, deploy smoke-gate fix — Gilad Feldman
  • bce4b7f [main] feat(tables): REQUEST_11 — flatten fields for non-clinical result tables (v2.4.95) — Gilad Feldman
  • 83ab6bf [main] docs(deploy): document pre-push canary hook timing — never timeout/kill the push — Gilad Feldman
  • 1158b1b [main] feat(tables): REQUEST_10 — HTTP-flatten enabling quality fixes + cross-flavor capture (v2.4.94) — Gilad Feldman
  • 2fd8711 [main] docs(iterate): 2026-06-18 run handoff (v2.4.92 shipped, caption-guard reverted, paused at architectural boundary) — Gilad Feldman
  • c671929 [main] docs(iterate): cycle 2 (v2.4.92 affiliation guard) + cycle 3 (caption-follows REVERTED) journal — Gilad Feldman
  • cf420ca [main] feat(render): never promote affiliation lines to subsection headings (v2.4.92) — Gilad Feldman
  • f392957 [main] docs(iterate): v2.4.91 shipped handoff + cycle journal — Gilad Feldman
  • 7edc62f [main] chore(canary): onboard efendic/maier/xiao into rotating pool (rotation now active) — Gilad Feldman
  • 662c4df [main] @ — Gilad Feldman
  • cfe86f7 [main] feat: add optional extraction guardrails for size and timeout — Gilad Feldman
  • aa82a25 [main] docs(todo): queue investigation for items 3 and 8 — Gilad Feldman
  • 617db41 [main] refactor: surface fallback exception classes in method metadata — Gilad Feldman
  • 24aa793 [main] feat: add fallback telemetry counters and optional logging — Gilad Feldman
  • a5da768 [main] ci: add docs-code consistency guard — Gilad Feldman
  • f8594c3 [main] docs: sync normalization and benchmark claims with current code — Gilad Feldman
  • c8800bd [main] docs: add root README landing page — Gilad Feldman
  • 4c55d6e [main] docs(iterate): 2026-06-16 resume handoff + concurrency-collision lesson — Gilad Feldman

View all commits →

item.title: output-it-forward: activity update
item.description:
giovannacdelsordo/output-it-forward

The `main` branch was updated with a commit that added a Chrome Webstore link for OIF, as stated in the commit message "Add Chrome Webstore link for OIF". No other branches were worked on in this set of commits. The specific change made was the addition of a link, with no other features or fixes mentioned. There were no changes to existing modules or addition of new ones, aside from the added link. The commit message does not mention any other areas of the repository being modified. The work was limited to a single commit on the `main` branch.

⚠ This repository was dormant and has recently become active again.

View all commits →
